sections.sectionTitle: Thu Uppih Mite Huhna ding Sumpi

verses.text: Judea gama om Pasian mite huhna ding tawh kisai-in lai kong gelh ding kisam nawnlo hi

Note' huhnopna thu ka theih khitsa hi a, Masedonia gama pawlpite kiangah zong note ka hong kisialhpih khitsa ahi hi. “Akhaia gama pawlpite in ni kum-a kipanin huhdingin a kithawisa uh ahi hi,” ci-in ka na gen hi. Tua banga note' lawpna in amaute tampi tak thanuamsak hi
Ahi zongin note ka hong kisialhpihna uh a mawkna a suahkhak lohna dingin na huhna ding uh na kiging khol un, ka hong cih mah bangin na kigin'kholh theihna dingun ka sanggamte uh ka hong ma paisak hi

Tua bang hi kei leh kei ka hong pai ciangin Masedonia gama ka lawmte in hong zuikha zenzen hen la, note a kiging lopi-in a om hong tuakkha leh, note ka hong muan' gen mahmahsa ahih manin note' maizum ding genloh, kote bangzah takin maizum ding ka hi uh hiam

Tua ahih manin piakdingin na kamciamsa uh huhna sumte a baihsa-in a omtheihna dingin hih ka sanggamte a hong mapai ding kisam ka sa hi. Tua hi leh kei ka hong tun' ciangin a baihsa-in na om ding a, note in piakloh phamawh cihna lungsim tawh hiloin utna lungsim tawh a pia na hihna uh hong kilang ding hi
Note in na phawk ding uh thu panin: Khaici tawm a vawhte in tawm mah la ding a, tampi a vawhte in tampi mah la ding uh hi
Pasian in piaknopna lungsim tawh a pia mite bek deih ahih manin, a kuamah peuh in na lungsim sung uhah na ngaihsutsa zah ciat uh na pia un la, pia nuamlopipi leh sawlzawh thu bek tawh na pia kei un
Note in na kisap khempeuh uh na neihtheihna ding uh leh midangte huhna ding zong na neihthuah theihna dingun Pasian in hong pia thei hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Lai Siangtho in, “Amah in citna tawh mizawngte pia zuahzuah a, ama migitna kip tawntung hi,” na ci hi
Tua ahih manin vawhding khaici leh nekding an hong pia Pasian in note' cit piakna hangin nopsakna lian tampi na ngahtheihna dingun note tungah a kisam khaici hong guan'in a pungsak ding hi
Kote tung tawnin note' huhna sumte a ngahna uh hangin mi tampi in Pasian a phattheihna dingin note na cit gamtatzawh tawntungna dingun Pasian in hong hausak tawntung ding hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh note' huhna sumte in Pasian' mi a cimawhte' dong a hu bek hiloin, Pasian' tungah lungdam kohna ding zong a piangsak ahi hi
Note in na up uh Jesuh hangin lungdamna thu-ah na cihtakna uh leh amaute leh midang khempeuh tungah na cit piakna hangun mi tampite in Pasian' min phat ding uh hi
Note tungah Pasian in hehpihna thupha a val a kanin hong piakna hangin amaute in note hong munuam mahmahin thu zong hong ngetsak ding uh hi
A manphatna a kigen zolo Pasian' hong piak hih thupha hangin Pasian tungah i lungdamna ko ciat ni.
